mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage, so higher INDPRO growth drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns than lower growth in walk-forward quintile tests, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the federal funds rate tightens discount rates and financial conditions, reducing equity valuation support and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.50pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS increases are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances, or the conditional mean return is not below baseline at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening labor demand and recession risk, compressing expected earnings and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns after triggered UNRATE increases are not lower than non-triggered periods in walk-forward tests, or if hit rate for negative returns is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Joint strength in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad household demand and construction activity, raising revenue expectations and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is positive and HOUST 3-month growth is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive RSAFS and HOUST trigger does not outperform periods where only one series is positive, or if 60-day conditional excess return is <= 0 in rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: Very low policy rates combined with elevated unemployment signals accommodative policy while slack remains, supporting risk appetite and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 1.0 and UNRATE is above 5.0
failure_condition: Reject if periods with FEDFUNDS below 1.0 and UNRATE above 5.0 do not produce positive average 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term is insignificant in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp deterioration in housing starts signals weaker interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by 60-day SPX returns above unconditional average in more than half of walk-forward cases, or conditional mean return is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: An inflation acceleration above a high threshold raises expected policy tightening and lowers real purchasing power, causing short-horizon equity multiple compression and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL acceleration triggers are not followed by below-baseline 5-day SPX returns, or if negative-return hit rate after triggers is below 52% in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained payroll employment growth signals rising aggregate income and demand, improving earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 6-month PAYEMS growth fails to rank positively with 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, or if top-quintile PAYEMS growth underperforms bottom-quintile growth.
